case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA EQUUIPMENT, INC., DOING VS. SAVANNA JAZZ, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA EQUUIPMENT, INC., DOING BUSINESS AS LIGHT SODA ON TAP HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAVANNA JAZZ, LLC THIAM, PASCAL AN INDIVIDUAL PASCAL THIAM, DOING BUSINESS AS SAVANNA JAZZ POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,272.72 DAMAGES, $350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,622.72, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAVANNA JAZZ, LLC THIAM, PASCAL AN INDIVIDUAL PASCAL THIAM, DOING BUSINESS AS SAVANNA JAZZ

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $350.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SAVANNA JAZZ, LLC THIAM, PASCAL AN INDIVIDUAL PASCAL THIAM, DOING BUSINESS AS SAVANNA JAZZ
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-23-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
